caption: A news broadcast features a male anchor wearing glasses, a dark suit, and a red tie, standing in a studio with a blue and white graphic background that reads "PLUS POLITICS". To his right is a split-screen window labeled "ON THE PHONE" featuring another man wearing a traditional red cap, with accompanying text identifying him as "OLUSOLA OYEKANMI POLITICAL ANALYST" from "LAGOS". A prominent white banner at the bottom of the screen displays the headline "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU" in bold black letters, with "PLUS POLITICS" written in small white text above it and "WATCH ONLINE" on the far left. A website address, "WWW.PLUSTVAFRICA.COM/LIVE-TV", appears on the right side of the lower banner. Across the sequence of frames, the scene remains static, with the anchor and the remote analyst maintaining their positions and expressions while the on-screen graphics and text remain unchanged.
